prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-FFKWSAFH6I-2PC-6 Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Fishing Fillet Knife Hard Sheath and Floating Handle, 6 inch Blade Description: One of the worst things possible on a fishing trip is losing a tool in the water, never to be seen again. The specially designed handle on this knife prevents that by acting as a flotation device for the knife. Never again will you lose your knife to depths of the river, lake or ocean you're fishing on.

The ergonomic handle is tailored to fit in either hand with such ease that makes cutting, even in wet situations, easier than other knives.

The black sheath will keep it safe when stored away. Don't leave home without the right tools. Search Terms: tackle box tool fishing bait knife raw meat home kitchen fish tapered blade 11 inch salmon fillet utility knives for Alaska fishermen crab long fixed gift men Features: - 6" blade - 11" full size - Floating plastic handle (will not sink) - Ergonomic grip - Includes black sheath === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6 inch Fishing Fillet Knife Floating Handle

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6 in Fishing Fillet Knife, Floating Handle, Sheath

anthropic.title_differentiation: Floating Handle Won't Sink, Ergonomic Grip, Hard Sheath Included, 11 Inch Full Size

openai.title_differentiation: Floating Plastic Handle, Ergonomic Grip, Will Not Sink, 6" Blade, 11" Full Size, Black Sheath, Wet Use
